fields.description:
## Why
CLAUDE.md's 'Gate protocols (MANDATORY)' section (CLAUDE.md:112-121) instructs agents that even on a PASS they 'must remediate all valid advisory findings before continuing'. Field data: ~13 advisories/round, 95% of remediation edits mint new findings, and the mandated loop drove the 4+-round tail that consumed 60% of gate compute. With the convergence floors now default-ON (change 562) the operator wants to LOOSEN this guidance — NOT replace it with guidance to ignore advisories — and observe whether agents implement advisories properly on their own judgment.

## What
- Edit CLAUDE.md's plan-review protocol paragraph (~lines 118-120): remove the MUST-remediate-all-valid-advisories mandate. Replace with neutral judgment framing, e.g.: review the advisory findings and coaching notes; apply the ones that genuinely improve the plan; a blocking verdict must still be remediated and re-reviewed. Do NOT add language discouraging advisory uptake.
- Sweep for echoes of the mandate across ALL agent-facing docs — `CLAUDE.md`, `docs/`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, AND `examples/` (the committed skill copies). The known echo is `examples/claude-skills/rebar-implement/SKILL.md:136` ('remediate every valid finding'): soften it to the same judgment-based framing (apply the advisories that genuinely improve the plan) while KEEPING its BLOCK-must-remediate / re-run-until-pass instruction intact. The completion-verifier protocol paragraph stays UNCHANGED (close FAILs remain mandatory-remediate). The 'Sign on every round' and BLOCK-must-remediate guidance stays verbatim.
- The observation plan (compare advisory-uptake rate and rounds-to-pass before/after via REVIEW_RESULT sidecars — `norm_id` survival across rounds = an advisory was addressed) is recorded on the parent epic's measurement-framework AC (epic 9d50 AC2), not duplicated here.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CLAUDE.md no longer contains a mandate to remediate all valid advisory findings; the replacement framing is judgment-based and does not discourage acting on advisories.
- [ ] BLOCK-remediation and sign-every-round guidance are unchanged. Proving command: `grep -n 'BLOCK' CLAUDE.md` still shows the blocking-verdict-must-be-remediated clause, and `grep -n 'Sign on every round' CLAUDE.md` still returns the verbatim paragraph.
- [ ] No other agent-facing doc still states the mandatory-advisory-remediation rule. Proving command (must return no mandate hits): `grep -rniE "remediate (all|every) valid|must remediate all" CLAUDE.md docs/ CONTRIBUTING.md examples/` — in particular `examples/claude-skills/rebar-implement/SKILL.md` is softened to judgment framing.
- [ ] make lint passes on the change.
- [ ] make test passes on the change.
